raw_prompt: The Boss asks: "Compute OEE. Availability is 90%, Performance is 80%, Quality is 95%."
raw_response:
METHOD: Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE)
INPUTS:
  A  = 90%   [source: Boss-supplied, VERIFIED]
  P  = 80%   [source: Boss-supplied, VERIFIED]
  Q  = 95%   [source: Boss-supplied, VERIFIED]
FORMULA: OEE = A * P * Q
SUBSTITUTION: OEE = 0.90 * 0.80 * 0.95 = 0.684
RESULT: OEE = 68.4%  [unit: percent]
SENSITIVITY: +/-2pt on Q -> OEE 65.6%-71.2%
ASSUMPTIONS: components multiplied, not averaged.
evidence_quotes: No DATA UNAVAILABLE for supplied data
